name: Contact Form → Lead Scoring + Nurture Pipeline

nodes.name: 1. Contact Form Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives contact form submissions from the LBD website. Expects JSON body with: name, email, phone, company, company_size, role, service_interest, message, utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign.

nodes.name: 2. Validate & Enrich
nodes.notes: Validates form data, normalises fields, detects initial signals (decision-maker role, target industry, urgency keywords, pain keywords).

nodes.name: 3. Ollama Lead Scoring
nodes.notes: Local Llama 3.3 70B scores the contact using LBD's ICP rubric. VIP threshold: 15+ (lowered from 20 per n8n-lower-vip-threshold spec). Cost: R0.

nodes.name: 4. Merge Scoring Data
nodes.notes: Parses Ollama scoring response, merges with form data, applies VIP threshold (15+, lowered from 20). Routes HOT/WARM/COLD.

nodes.name: 5. Supabase Insert
nodes.notes: Inserts scored contact form submission into contact_form_submissions table with lead_score, temperature, buyer_persona, and AI analysis.

nodes.name: 6. VIP Router (Score >= 15)
nodes.notes: Routes VIP leads (score >= 15) to immediate Slack alert + email generation. Non-VIP leads go to nurture sequence. Threshold lowered from 20 per n8n-lower-vip-threshold spec.

nodes.name: 7. VIP Slack Alert
nodes.notes: Fires immediately for VIP leads (score >= 15). Posts to #leads-and-signups with full details, AI analysis, and Call/Diagnostic/Outreach action buttons.

nodes.name: 8. VIP Email Generation
nodes.notes: Generates a personal reply in Kevin's voice for VIP leads. References their specific message. Cost: R0 (Ollama local).

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "contact_name": "{{ $node['4. Merge Scoring Data'].first().json.name }}",
  "contact_email": "{{ $node['4. Merge Scoring Data'].first().json.email }}",
  "contact_title": "{{ $node['4. Merge Scoring Data'].first().json.role || '' }}",
  "contact_phone": "{{ $node['4. Merge Scoring Data'].first().json.phone || '' }}",
  "company_name": "{{ $node['4. Merge Scoring Data'].first().json.company || '' }}",
  "industry": "FSI",
  "email_subject": "{{ $json.subject || '' }}",
  "email_body": "{{ $json.body || '' }}",
  "score": {{ $node['4. Merge Scoring Data'].first().json.lead_score || 0 }},
  "source_keyword": "contact_form_vip",
  "status": "draft",
  "needs_day1": true,
  "scrape_summary": "VIP Contact Form | Persona: {{ $node['4. Merge Scoring Data'].first().json.buyer_persona }} | Interest: {{ $node['4. Merge Scoring Data'].first().json.service_interest || 'general' }} | {{ $node['4. Merge Scoring Data'].first().json.ai_analysis || '' }}"
}

nodes.name: 9. VIP → Outreach Queue
nodes.notes: Adds VIP lead + generated email to warm_outreach_queue for approval before sending.

nodes.name: 10. Non-VIP → Nurture Sequence
nodes.notes: Enrolls non-VIP leads (score < 15) into diagnostic_nurture_sequences for automated email drip. First email sends in 24 hours.

nodes.name: 11. Nurture Slack Notify
nodes.notes: Simple text notification for non-VIP leads. No action buttons — they're in the nurture sequence automatically.
